note: Evidence Curator v2.2 curation map. One entry per bill: plain_topic (citizen wording), theme_id, relevance (core = water/data-center policy; adjacent = touches the issue in part; context = found by broad search or index but not water policy). Themes are citizen-facing labels.

themes.water-permits: Water permits and the State Engineer's rules
themes.rights-retirement: Buying, banking, or retiring water rights
themes.oversight-courts: Courts and oversight of water decisions
themes.utilities-districts: Water utilities, districts, and local agencies
themes.big-users: Data centers, big water users, and tax deals
themes.planning-supply: Colorado River, planning, studies, and new supply
